seo.homeTitle: AnimeHubs - Premium Anime Figures in Uppsala, Sweden
seo.homeDescription: Hand-picked anime collectibles from Japan, available for local pickup in Uppsala, Sweden. Browse figures, keychains, pins, and more.
seo.productsDescription: Browse our collection of anime figures, keychains, and pins. Available for local pickup and delivery in Uppsala, Sweden.

seo.cartDescription: Review your shopping cart and proceed to checkout.
seo.checkoutDescription: Complete your reservation for anime figures with local pickup in Uppsala.
seo.privacyDescription: Learn how AnimeHubs handles your personal data in compliance with GDPR.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At AnimeHubs, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.section1Content: AnimeHubs operates in Uppsala, Sweden. For questions about your data, contact us via Instagram.
privacy.section2Content: When you make a reservation, we collect your name and email address. We also use cookies for essential site functionality.
privacy.section3Content: Your data is used solely for processing your reservation and sending confirmation emails. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.section4Content: Reservation data is kept for up to 12 months after the reservation date, after which it is deleted.
privacy.section5Content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. You can also object to processing. Contact us via Instagram to exercise these rights.
privacy.section6Content: We use essential cookies for site functionality (e.g., cart data, language preference). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.section7Content: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies to make this site work. No tracking cookies are used.
